n : ℕ

ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut : Type
inst✝ : (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx) → SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)
σ : Type
init : ProbComp σ
impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp)
outerRelIn : Set (OuterStmtIn × OuterWitIn)
outerRelOut : Set (OuterStmtOut × OuterWitOut)
innerRelIn : Set (InnerStmtIn × InnerWitIn)
innerRelOut : Set (InnerStmtOut × InnerWitOut)
R : Reduction oSpec InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut pSpec
completenessError : NNReal
lens : Context.Lens OuterStmtIn OuterStmtOut InnerStmtIn InnerStmtOut OuterWitIn OuterWitOut InnerWitIn InnerWitOut
lensComplete :
  Context.Lens.IsComplete outerRelIn innerRelIn outerRelOut innerRelOut
    (Reduction.compatContext n pSpec ι oSpec OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn InnerWitIn
      InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut lens R)
    lens
h :
  ∀ (stmtIn : InnerStmtIn) (witIn : InnerWitIn),
    (stmtIn, witIn) ∈ innerRelIn →
      Pr[fun z => (z.2, z.1.2.2) ∈ innerRelOut ∧ z.1.2.1 = z.1.2.1 |
          OptionT.mk
            (have impl := impl.addLift challengeQueryImpl;
            do
            let __do_lift ← init
            ((fun {α} x => (simulateQ impl).toFun α x) (run stmtIn witIn R)).run' __do_lift)] ≥
        1 - ↑completenessError
outerStmtIn : OuterStmtIn
outerWitIn : OuterWitIn
hRelIn : (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn) ∈ outerRelIn
hR :
  Pr[fun z => (z.2, z.1.2.2) ∈ innerRelOut ∧ z.1.2.1 = z.1.2.1 |
      OptionT.mk
        (have impl := impl.addLift challengeQueryImpl;
        do
        let __do_lift ← init
        ((fun {α} x => (simulateQ impl).toFun α x)
                (run (lens.stmt.proj outerStmtIn) (lens.wit.proj (outerStmtIn, outerWitIn)) R)).run'
            __do_lift)] ≥
    1 - ↑completenessError
⊢ Pr[fun z => (z.2, z.1.2.2) ∈ outerRelOut ∧ z.1.2.1 = z.1.2.1 |
      OptionT.mk
        (have impl := impl.addLift challengeQueryImpl;
        do
        let __do_lift ← init
        ((fun {α} x => (simulateQ impl).toFun α x)
                (run outerStmtIn outerWitIn
                  (@Reduction.liftContext n pSpec ι oSpec OuterStmtIn OuterWitIn OuterStmtOut OuterWitOut InnerStmtIn
                    InnerWitIn InnerStmtOut InnerWitOut lens R))).run'
            __do_lift)] ≥
    1 - ↑completenessError
